testcase.name: testSearchByProductName

failure.message: TestCase failed. Product 'Sony vaio i5' is not visible.

testcase.name: testSearchByCategory

failure.message: TestCase failed. Expected product 'Apple monitor 24' to be visible under category 'Monitors', but it was not found. expected object to not be null

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: TestCase failed.
